## Frontend Checklist

Use this section if the PR includes frontend changes.

- [ ] UI matches the expected design or issue requirements
- [ ] Responsive behavior was verified
- [ ] Loading states are handled
- [ ] Empty states are handled
- [ ] Error states are handled
- [ ] No console errors were introduced
- [ ] Existing user flow was not broken

---

## Backend Checklist

Use this section if the PR includes backend changes.

- [ ] Endpoint behavior was verified
- [ ] Request validation was added or preserved
- [ ] Error handling was added or preserved
- [ ] Existing API behavior was not broken
- [ ] Database/Prisma changes were reviewed
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or sensitive values were committed
- [ ] Environment variables were documented if needed

2. Connecting a wallet.
